description: Backend data contract for Add Parent page – creating a new parent account, linking students, and setting notification preferences.

createParent.description: Register a new parent/guardian account, link to students, and store notification preferences.

requestBody.relation: enum: father, mother, guardian, grandparent, other (required)
requestBody.password: string (required, min 8 characters, strength validated on frontend)
linkedStudentIds: array of student IDs (string), optional but recommended

400.message: Validation error (missing required fields, invalid email/phone/password)

404.message: One or more student IDs not found

getAvailableStudents.description: Fetch list of students available for linking (used in Step 2 search). Supports search by name, class, or RFID.

checkEmailAvailability.description: Check if an email is already used by a parent (to avoid duplicate registration).

checkPhoneAvailability.description: Check if a phone number is already used.

fieldNotes.password: Frontend sends plain password; backend must hash (bcrypt) before storing. ConfirmPassword is validated frontend only.
fieldNotes.linkedStudentIds: Array of student IDs that should be associated with the parent in a parent-student join table. Many-to-many relationship.
fieldNotes.avatarColor: Optional; frontend can compute deterministic color from student ID or name; backend may ignore or store a hex code.
fieldNotes.preferences: Stored per parent; used when sending notifications. Defaults applied if not provided.
